sourcePolicy: grossMarginPct/netMarginPct marked xbrl_confirmed are from SEC XBRL filings collected 2026-06-03. operatingMarginPct and analyst fields are from public reporting as of mid-2025 — refresh each quarter. Analyst dollar targets are denominated in current share price units; verify for any stock splits.

MSFT.analystNote: Targets as of June 2026. Azure AI and Copilot adoption driving upside revisions.

AMZN.grossMarginNote: XBRL shows 0.77% — incorrect; Amazon retail COGS accounting causes mismatch. 46.8% from public segment reporting.
AMZN.analystNote: Targets as of June 2026. AWS re-acceleration and ads margin expansion driving coverage upgrades.

CEG.analystNote: Targets as of June 2026. Nuclear power demand narrative intact; Microsoft/data-center PPA pipeline key catalyst.

META.grossMarginNote: XBRL null — META advertising gross margin ~81%; XBRL concept mismatch.
META.analystNote: Targets as of June 2026. Llama open-source moat, ad platform AI efficiency, and Threads growth driving upgrades. Reality Labs burn rate key watch.

SPY.analystNote: S&P 500 index ETF — no per-share analyst target. Track aggregate S&P 500 forward earnings estimates.

MA.grossMarginNote: XBRL null — Mastercard network gross margin ~74%.
MA.analystNote: Targets as of June 2026. Cross-border volume growth, stablecoin partnership tailwinds (BVNK deal). Payment volume trends remain constructive.

BMNR.analystNote: Small-cap speculative — no known analyst coverage. Thesis must be fully human-reviewed before any action.

TSNF.analystNote: OTC-traded foreign company — no US analyst coverage. Requires direct research from company filings.

NFLX.grossMarginNote: XBRL shows 5.49% — incorrect due to content amortization accounting mismatch. 43% from public reporting.
NFLX.analystNote: 10:1 stock split CONFIRMED — approved Oct 30 2025, effective Nov 17 2025. All targets are post-split. Advertising, live events, and password-sharing crackdown sustaining growth.

TSLT.reason: Levered ETF (2× daily TSLA). Track TSLA thesis separately; TSLT is a sizing/tactical vehicle only.

CONL.reason: Levered ETF (2× daily COIN). Track COIN macro cycle separately; CONL is a tactical vehicle only.
